# Test: apx dep add with external API provenance
#
# This scenario verifies:
# 1. Adding a dependency on an external API populates provenance in lock file
# 2. The dep add output shows external source info
# 3. First-party dependencies do NOT get provenance fields

# Setup: Create an app repo with a catalog containing external APIs
mkdir app
cd app
exec git init
exec apx init app --org=testorg --repo=myapp --non-interactive internal/apis/proto/services/users

# Create catalog with mixed modules
mkdir -p catalog
exec sh -c 'echo "version: 1" > catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "org: testorg" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "repo: apis" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "modules:" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "  - id: proto/payments/ledger/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    name: proto/payments/ledger/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    format: proto" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    domain: payments" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    path: proto/payments/ledger/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    latest_stable: v1.2.3" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    lifecycle: stable" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "  - id: proto/google/pubsub/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    name: proto/google/pubsub/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    format: proto" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    domain: google" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    path: google/pubsub/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    latest_stable: v1.0.0" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    lifecycle: stable" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    origin: external" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    managed_repo: github.com/Infoblox-CTO/apis-contrib-google" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    upstream_repo: github.com/googleapis/googleapis" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    upstream_path: google/pubsub/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    import_mode: preserve" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'

# Add first-party dependency - no provenance in output
exec apx add proto/payments/ledger/v1@v1.2.3
stdout 'Added dependency: proto/payments/ledger/v1@v1.2.3'
! stdout 'Source:'

# Verify lock file has no provenance for first-party
exec cat apx.lock
stdout 'proto/payments/ledger/v1'
! stdout 'origin'
! stdout 'upstream_repo'

# Add external API dependency - shows provenance in output
exec apx add proto/google/pubsub/v1@v1.0.0
stdout 'Added dependency: proto/google/pubsub/v1@v1.0.0'
stdout 'Source:.*github.com/Infoblox-CTO/apis-contrib-google'
stdout 'external'
stdout 'preserve'

# Verify lock file contains provenance fields for external API
exec cat apx.lock
stdout 'origin: external'
stdout 'upstream_repo: github.com/googleapis/googleapis'
stdout 'upstream_path: google/pubsub/v1'
stdout 'import_mode: preserve'
